allow: PowerShell($process = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($process\) { $pid = $process.OwningProcess; Write-Host "PID: $pid"; taskkill /PID $pid /F } else { Write-Host "No process using port 3000" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/v1/contracts/generate" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"description":"A voting contract that lets users vote on proposals with yes/no options"}' -TimeoutSec 30 2>&1; $response.data.generationId)
PowerShell(Get-Process node | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -eq "node"} | Stop-Process -Force 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Backend processes stopped")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:54249/api/v1/contracts/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"description\\":\\"A simple counter contract\\",\\"model\\":\\"groq\\"}")
